channel.title: Human Design Engine Weekly
channel.description: Weekly transit updates and Human Design insights powered by the Human Design Engine. Explore the cosmic weather through the lens of Human Design — gate activations, planetary transits, and practical experiments for living your design.
channel.itunes:author: Human Design Engine
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly transit updates and Human Design insights powered by the Human Design Engine. Explore the cosmic weather through the lens of Human Design — gate activations, planetary transits, and practical experiments for living your design.

item.title: Human Design Weekly: May 29, 2026
item.description: Welcome back to the Human Design Engine weekly transit update. I'm your host, and we're diving into the cosmic weather for the week of May 29. This week, the Sun continues its journey through the wheel, bringing new themes for us to explore and ex...
item.itunes:summary:
Episode Date: 2026-05-29
## Intro Welcome back to the Human Design Engine weekly transit update. I'm your host, and we're diving into the cosmic weather for the week of May 29. This week, the Sun continues its journey through the wheel, bringing new themes for us to explore and experiment with.
## Transit Highlights
### Skills (Gate 16) Starting May 29, the Sun activates Skills. Gate 16 is the energy of enthusiasm for skills and mastery. It is the gate of the performer, the craftsman, and anyone who derives joy from doing something well. This is not about natural talent but about the pleasure of practice, repetition, and refinement. Those with this gate have a contagious enthusiasm that inspires others to develop their own skills. The shadow is superficial dabbling or performance without substance.
### Change (Gate 35) Starting June 02, the Sun activates Change. Gate 35 is the energy of change and progress through experience. It carries the hunger for new experiences, new places, and new people — not for novelty's sake but because experience is how this gate learns and grows. This is the gate of the adventurer and the lifelong learner. The gift is adaptability and the wisdom gained through direct experience. The shadow is chronic restlessness, inability to commit, or the endless pursuit of the next thing.
### Gathering (Gate 45) Starting June 07, the Sun activates Gathering. Gate 45 is the energy of gathering and the role of the king or queen. It represents the capacity to gather resources, people, and influence for the benefit of the tribe — and to distribute them wisely. This gate understands that wealth is meant to flow through, not to hoard. The gift is benevolent leadership and resource stewardship. The shadow is greed, entitlement, or the abuse of positional power.
## Practical Experiment Your Experiment for the Week: Focus on the theme of Skills (Gate 16). Notice where you are being called to express this energy or where you see it in the world around you.
## Outro That's it for this week's transit highlights. As always, use this information as a map, but trust your own strategy and authority as your compass. Stay aligned, and we'll see you next week.
## CTA Ready to dive deeper? Visit humandesignengine.com to get your personalized transit report and see exactly how these planetary movements are conditioning your unique design.
item.itunes:author: Human Design Engine

item.title: Human Design Weekly: May 20, 2024
item.description: Welcome back to the Human Design Engine weekly transit update. I'm your host, and we're diving into the cosmic weather for the week of May 20. This week, the Sun continues its journey through the wheel, bringing new themes for us to explore and ex...
item.itunes:summary:
Episode Date: 2024-05-20
## Intro Welcome back to the Human Design Engine weekly transit update. I'm your host, and we're diving into the cosmic weather for the week of May 20. This week, the Sun continues its journey through the wheel, bringing new themes for us to explore and experiment with.
## Transit Highlights
### Contribution (Gate 8) Starting May 20, the Sun activates Contribution. Gate 8 is the energy of contribution through authentic example. It is the gate of the role model — one who contributes not by instructing but by being. This frequency knows that the most powerful teaching is demonstration. When Gate 8 is defined, others naturally look to this person as an example of how to live authentically. The high expression is humble, embodied wisdom. The shadow is self-consciousness or performing for approval.
### Contemplation (Gate 20) Starting May 21, the Sun activates Contemplation. Gate 20 is the energy of contemplation and presence in the now. It represents pure awareness — the capacity to be fully present in the moment without agenda or expectation. This is the gate of meditation, mindfulness, and the recognition that being is as important as doing. Those with Gate 20 bring a quality of grounded presence that allows others to slow down. The shadow is detachment from life or paralysis through overthinking.
### Skills (Gate 16) Starting May 27, the Sun activates Skills. Gate 16 is the energy of enthusiasm for skills and mastery. It is the gate of the performer, the craftsman, and anyone who derives joy from doing something well. This is not about natural talent but about the pleasure of practice, repetition, and refinement. Those with this gate have a contagious enthusiasm that inspires others to develop their own skills. The shadow is superficial dabbling or performance without substance.
## Practical Experiment Your Experiment for the Week: Focus on the theme of Contribution (Gate 8). Notice where you are being called to express this energy or where you see it in the world around you.
## Outro That's it for this week's transit highlights. As always, use this information as a map, but trust your own strategy and authority as your compass. Stay aligned, and we'll see you next week.
## CTA Ready to dive deeper? Visit humandesignengine.com to get your personalized transit report and see exactly how these planetary movements are conditioning your unique design.
item.itunes:author: Human Design Engine
